e.stopPropagation()}>

{selectedProfessional.name}

{selectedProfessional.name.toLowerCase().replace(" ", "")}@aco-law.com
Associate

Professional Background

Christophorus Wisnoe Rurupadang (“Christo”) joined A&CO in February 2020. At A&CO, he focuses his practice on Litigation, Commercial Disputes, Intellectual Property, Restructuring & Insolvency, Manpower, and General Corporate. He has worked on a variety of suspension debts payment cases (“PKPU”) across a wide range of industries and sectors.

A 2019 graduate of Padjadjaran University Law Faculty, where he majored in Economic Law, he was an active member of the university’s moot court community, and represented his university in a national moot court competition. He was on the winning team in a moot court competition held by Gadjah Mada University in 2016.

Christo has passed the Indonesian Bar Exam organized by the Indonesian Advocates Association (Perhimpunan Advokat Indonesia – PERADI) in 2020 and he is a licensed advocate from the Indonesian Bar Association (PERADI) in 2022.

Experience

Christo’s main areas of practice include Debt Restructuring, Bankruptcy, Intellectual Property, Civil and Commercial Litigation, and Family Law.
